steps.note: Origin — a penniless stable-hand. Labour a little for early coin.
Idle to the spark (timer ~45s) — a purely idle player still awakens.
Awakening: Study un-gates. Trickle Insight to afford the first cantrips.
Read the Page opens the web AND (first cantrip) claims the lair — Home opens. A tick lets progression register the lair beat.
Spark awakens Fire ▲ — the prerequisite for taking contracts.
Free the Study slot and take Ward a Barn (Running, repeatable): our Renown source and best early Gold. Fire drain 0.15/s < Spark's 0.2/s trickle, so it self-sustains.
Work the contract repeatedly (~30 cycles): Gold + Renown accrue for the Founding.
Secure a Guild Charter (needs a name — Renown ≥ 8 — and 60 Gold).
Claim the Ruined Tower — the Site (the big 120-Gold sink).
Gate is open: Gold ≥ 100 held, Renown ≥ 25, Charter ✓, Site ✓ — Found the Academy.
The finale: flag founded flips, phase → 'founded', the Academy tab un-greys.
